LanguageData.VVE_VehicleRepairs_Fast.description:
We mend with urgency, understanding the vital role our vehicles play in our lives.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Adds +1 to Repair Job Limitations on a vehicle (as long as "Multiple pawns per job" is active in Mod settings).
LanguageData.VVE_VehicleRepairs_Fast.label: fast
LanguageData.VVE_VehicleRepairs_Slow.description: Repairs are a careful ritual, not to be rushed, but to be performed with reverence.
LanguageData.VVE_VehicleRepairs_Slow.label: slow
LanguageData.VVE_VehicleRepairs_Standard.description: Our approach to repairs is balanced, ensuring vehicles are restored to their rightful state.
LanguageData.VVE_VehicleRepairs_Standard.label: standard
